name: @intentsolutionsio/obsidian-project-documentation
description: Automatically documents technical projects in Obsidian vaults during Claude Code sessions

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install obsidian-project-documentation\\n  or /plugin install obsidian-project-documentation@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
